John Vervaeke argues higher states of consciousness are a domain general [[flow state]].<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref>

Merleu Ponty Phenomenology of perception explores this

== See Also ==

* [[Gnosis]]

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Higher state of consciousness]][[Category:Higher States of Consciousness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
